movie.actors: Elisabeth Shue, Kevin Bacon, Josh Brolin, Kim Dickens
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 7 wins & 11 nominations.
movie.plot: When the leader of a team of scientists volunteers to be the test subject for their experiment in human invisibility, he slowly unravels and turns against them, with horrific consequences.
movie.title: Hollow Man
movie.writer: Gary Scott Thompson (story), Andrew W. Marlowe (story), Andrew W. Marlowe (screenplay)
